name: Isalathiso Sokothuka
description: Isalathisi senani elikhawulezayo le-hemodynamic stability. Ibalwe njenge-HR / SBP. Eqhelekileyo yi-0.5-0.7.
instructions: Yahlula izinga lentliziyo ngoxinzelelo lwegazi lwe-systolic. Ukunyuka kwesalathiso somothuko kubonisa ukuwohloka.

obstetric.note: Obstetric Shock Index (OSI) isebenzisa ifomula efanayo. SI> 0.9 kwizigulane ezikhulelweyo zibalulekile. I-HR eqhelekileyo iphezulu ekukhulelweni (80-100 bpm).
